label: 关键点关系图
description: 原样透传 keypoint（层级树 + 关系图）字典，并在节点下方以可交互的力导向图展示：父子关系、clearance 距离、方位关系分别用不同样式连边，并附带可点击高亮的层级清单。用于检查关键点结构与节点间关系。
description-en: Pass a keypoint dict (hierarchy tree + relation graph) through unchanged and render it below the node as an interactive force-directed graph: parent-child, clearance distance and orientation relations each use a distinct edge style, plus a click-to-highlight hierarchy list. Useful for inspecting keypoint structure and inter-node relations.

inputs.name: keypoint
inputs.label: keypoint
inputs.description: 输入 keypoint 字典（{ hierarchy, relations }）；将被原样透传，并在 UI 中展示关系图
inputs.description-en: Input keypoint dict ({ hierarchy, relations }); passed through unchanged and rendered as a relation graph.

outputs.name: keypoint
outputs.label: keypoint
outputs.description: 与输入完全一致的 keypoint 字典
outputs.description-en: The same keypoint dict as the input.
